title: Some users may have been unable to successfully invoke Power Automate flows from their SharePoint (SPFx) applications
impact: Users may have been unable to successfully invoke Power Automate flows from their SPFx applications.

updates.content:
Title: Some users may have been unable to successfully invoke Power Automate flows from their SharePoint (SPFx) applications 

User impact: Users may have been unable to successfully invoke Power Automate flows from their SPFx applications.

Final status: We've identified that a recent service update introduced a token provider that was incorrectly modifying a specific resource endpoint URL, resulting in impact. We've reverted service to the previous known working version, and received feedback from a number of affected users that impact has been remediated.

Scope of impact: Impact was specific to users attempting to invoke Power Automate flows from their SPFx applications.

Start time: Wednesday, April 29, 2026, at 11:30 PM UTC

End time: Tuesday, May 05, 2026, at 1:00 PM UTC

Root cause: A recent service update introduced a token provider that was incorrectly modifying a specific resource endpoint URL and resulted in impact. 

Next steps: 
- We're reviewing our update procedures to better identify similar issues during our development and testing cycles.

This is the final update for the event.
